action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current global environment parameters including the current year, the agent's cash balance, and the current market price per unit of timber.

action_set_definitions.name: get_plot_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed information for specific forest plots, including current standing biomass volume and growth rates.

plot_ids.description: List of plot identifiers to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_technical_manual
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves engineering and safety protocol requirements for specific harvesting systems to ensure regulatory compliance.

system_type.description: The type of system to query (e.g., 'cable yarding').

action_set_definitions.name: execute_harvest
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a timber harvest on a specific plot. Requires a valid protocol ID to satisfy safety regulations.

plot_id.description: The ID of the plot to harvest.

volume.description: The amount of biomass to harvest.

protocol_id.description: The safety protocol identifier retrieved from the technical manual.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_year
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation to the next calendar year, allowing for forest growth and market fluctuations.

state_description.current_year: The current year of the simulation.
state_description.cash_balance: Available capital for operations and planting.
state_description.plots: List of forest plots under management.
state_description.market_price_per_unit: Current market price for one unit of timber volume.
